zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Beaugency於1108年10月11日出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希時，她的父親Raoul Ier de Beaugency40歲，母親Mathilde de Vermandois38歲。她於1132年7月9日與Enguerrand de Coucy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1163年在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年55歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯勞。

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Beaugency was born on 11 October 1108, in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Raoul Ier de Beaugency, was 40 and her mother, Mathilde de Vermandois, was 38. She married Enguerrand de Coucy on 9 July 1132. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1163, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Laon, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Beaugency est née le 11 octobre 1108, à Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Raoul Ier de Beaugency, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Vermandois, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand de Coucy le 9 juillet 1132. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1163, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Laon, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Beaugency am 11. Oktober 1108 in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul Ier de Beaugency 40 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Vermandois 38. Sie hat am 9. Juli 1132 Enguerrand de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1163 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Laon, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Beaugency è nata il il 11 ottobre 1108 nel Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, sua padre, Raoul Ier de Beaugency, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Vermandois, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand de Coucy il 9 luglio 1132. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1163, nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Laon, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Beaugencyが1108年10月11日にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトビーウジェンシで生まれた時，父Raoul Ier de Beaugencyは40歳，母Mathilde de Vermandoisは38歳であった。1132年7月9日にEnguerrand de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1163年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで55歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンラオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Beaugency(이)가 1108년 10월 11일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul Ier de Beaugency(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Vermandois(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1132년 7월 9일 Enguerrand de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1163년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Beaugency nasceu em 11 de outubro de 1108, em Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Raoul Ier de Beaugency, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Vermandois, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand de Coucy em 9 de julho de 1132. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1163, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Laon, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Beaugency родилась 11 октября 1108 г. в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul Ier de Beaugency было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Vermandois, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand de Coucy 9 июля 1132 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1163 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности лаон, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Beaugency nació el 11 de octubre de 1108, en Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, su papá, Raoul Ier de Beaugency, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Vermandois, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Enguerrand de Coucy el 9 de julio de 1132. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1163, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Laon, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
